search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk NG238 cardiovascular risk assessment review lipid blood pressure diabetes renal
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic QRISK or other score output
automatic statin, blood-pressure, diabetes, or lifestyle recommendations
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: Risk calculation requires complete validated inputs and a locally accepted tool.
No treatment, medicine, dose, target, or lifestyle instruction was generated.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Adults undergoing clinician-led cardiovascular-risk review for primary or secondary prevention.
setting_applicability: Primary and outpatient prevention review; acute symptoms and established disease pathways require separate care.
UAE_applicability: International NICE evidence requires UAE risk-tool, ethnicity, laboratory, prescribing, referral, and prevention-policy adaptation.
recency_verification: Current NICE NG238 source was reviewed on 2026-07-13.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The NICE section supports clinician-led cardiovascular-risk review, family and medical context, patient preferences, and documented lifestyle discussion without calculating risk or generating advice.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular risk review and documented lifestyle discussion without autonomously generating advice.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The baseline assessment section supports reviewing blood pressure, lipid, diabetes, renal, liver, thyroid, BMI, and symptom context only when measured or already ordered.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports full lipid profile, blood pressure, BMI, diabetes status, renal function, liver transaminases, thyroid context, muscle symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.

unresolved_source_gaps: Age, sex, ethnicity, smoking, family history, blood pressure, lipids, diabetes, kidney disease, BMI, comorbidities, validated score, absolute risk, patient preference, treatment, referral, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
